docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY POPE, JAMES D AS TO DEFENDANT PALICHARIA, TULASI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF POPE, JAMES D AS TO DEFENDANT PALICHARIA, TULASI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-30-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES D POPE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TULASI PALICHARIA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES D. POPE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TULASI PALICHARIA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
